name: PMGC Holdings Inc.
business: PMGC Holdings Inc. is a diversified holding company with four wholly owned subsidiaries: Northstrive Biosciences Inc. (biopharmaceuticals developing muscle-preserving therapies for obesity), Pacific Sun Packaging, Inc. (specialty packaging for IT hardware components), AGA Precision Systems LLC (high-tolerance CNC machining for aerospace, defense, and industrial sectors), and PMGC Capital LLC (multi-strategy investment firm). The company sells custom-engineered protective packaging for CPUs, memory modules, SSDs, HDDs, and fiber-optic transceivers to customers in semiconductor, data center, and networking supply chains, and provides precision-machined components from titanium and Inconel to aerospace, defense, and industrial customers.
sellsTo: IT asset disposition and lifecycle management firms

exposures.sentence: Northstrive Biosciences Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focusing on the development and acquisition of cutting-edge aesthetic medicines and therapeutic products.

Pacific Sun Packaging designs and supplies custom-engineered protective packaging for delicate components such as central processing units (CPUs), memory modules ... solid state drives (SSDs), hard disk drives (HDDs), and fiber-optic transceivers, serving customers across the semiconductor, data center, and networking equipment supply chains.

Pacific Sun Packaging designs and supplies custom-engineered protective packaging for delicate components ... serving customers across the semiconductor, data center, and networking equipment supply chains.

AGA Precision Systems LLC is a specialized computer numerical control (CNC) machine shop focused on high-tolerance milling, turning, mold manufacturing, and machining of complex metals including titanium and Inconel, serving customers across the aerospace, defense, and industrial sectors.

catalysts.event: IND submission for EL-22 in the U.S.
catalysts.sentence: The Company intends to complete an IND submission in 2025 and to initiate clinical trials in the U.S. to evaluate the myostatin approach in combination with one or more GLP-1 receptor agonists in obesity.

catalysts.event: Potential IND submission for EL-22 in 2026
catalysts.sentence: The Company aspires to either complete an IND submission in 2026, assuming it has sufficient working capital, or to enter into a collaboration with another company to do so.

tamClaims.claim: Goldman Sachs predicts the anti-obesity drug market could reach $100 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Goldman Sachs predicts that this epidemic will create a $100 billion market for anti-obesity players.

tamClaims.claim: Global precision machining market valued at $123 billion in 2025, expected CAGR 8.1% from 2026 to 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Grand View Research, the global precision machining market was valued at approximately $123 billion in 2025 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of approximately 8.1% from 2026 to 2033.

tamClaims.claim: Global aerospace parts manufacturing market valued at $913 billion in 2023, expected CAGR 4.2% from 2024 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The global aerospace parts manufacturing market was valued at approximately $913 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of approximately 4.2% from 2024 to 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Global electronic packaging market valued at $62.5 billion in 2024, expected to reach $89.7 billion by 2030, CAGR 6.2%.
